entities.name: Wednesday 25 February 2026
entities.description: Date of the media release

relations.description: Catherine King and Gabrielle Williams today released early designs for the new Sunshine interchange and announced construction has begun.
Catherine King and Gabrielle Williams today released early designs for the new Sunshine interchange and announced construction has begun.
The $4.1 billion joint investment will untangle the complex rail junction at Sunshine.
The $4.1 billion joint investment will untangle the complex rail junction at Sunshine.
The Allan Government is also investing $143 million to improve the precinct around the station.
The Allan Labor Government today also announced a brand new, fully accessible Tottenham Station will also be built on the realigned Sunbury Line.
A new Albion Station, which will be fully funded by the Allan Government, will deliver modern and accessible facilities for passengers.
Federal Member for Fraser Daniel Mulino
Victorian Member for Laverton Sarah Connolly
Victorian Member for Footscray Katie Hall
Victorian Member for St Albans Natalie Suleyman
This is the first critical step in delivering a rail link to Melbourne Airport and transforming Sunshine into a major transport superhub.
It will connect regional services, the Metro Tunnel and future airport trains in one central location.
The Sunbury Line will be realigned to make way for airport rail and a future electrified Melton line.
